Operation 'getschedule' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic and doesn't specify 'regulatory schedule'. Description lacks clarity about input parameters, return structure, and use case context. Enhanced version specifies what schedule data is returned and clarifies the regulatory context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve regulatory classifications for a given drug product.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve regulatory schedule classification for drug product
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the regulatory schedule classification(s) for a specified drug product. Accepts drug product identifiers as input parameters. Returns schedule information including schedule code and description. Use this operation to determine the regulatory control level and restrictions applicable to a drug product.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't specify 'regulatory schedule'. Description lacks clarity about input parameters, return structure, and use case context. Enhanced version specifies what schedule data is returned and clarifies the regulatory context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getstatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic ('product status' could mean many things). Description lacks input parameter details and specific status values. Enhanced version clarifies the authorization context, provides examples of possible status values, and explains the practical use case for AI agents.

data.current_description: Retrieve the current authorization state for a given drug product.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current authorization status for drug product
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current authorization state for a specified drug product, indicating whether the product is active, discontinued, or in another regulatory status. Accepts drug product identifiers as input parameters. Returns status information including status code and effective date. Use this operation to verify if a drug product is currently authorized for sale or distribution in Canada.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic ('product status' could mean many things). Description lacks input parameter details and specific status values. Enhanced version clarifies the authorization context, provides examples of possible status values, and explains the practical use case for AI agents.

message: Operation 'gettherapeuticclass' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary lacks specificity about ATC codes. Description mentions ATC codes but doesn't explain the acronym or clarify input/output details. Enhanced version expands ATC acronym, clarifies what information is returned, and explains the practical purpose for AI agents determining drug therapeutic categories.

data.current_description: Retrieve drug classifications by therapeutic use (ATC codes) for a given drug product.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve ATC therapeutic classification for drug product
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical (ATC) classification(s) for a specified drug product, indicating its therapeutic use category. Accepts drug product identifiers as input parameters. Returns therapeutic class information including ATC code and therapeutic description. Use this operation to identify the therapeutic category or medical indication classification of a drug product.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about ATC codes. Description mentions ATC codes but doesn't explain the acronym or clarify input/output details. Enhanced version expands ATC acronym, clarifies what information is returned, and explains the practical purpose for AI agents determining drug therapeutic categories.

message: Operation 'getveterinaryspecies' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is vague about whether this applies to all products or only veterinary products. Description lacks input parameter details and specific output structure. Enhanced version clarifies this is veterinary-specific, explains input requirements, specifies return values with examples, and provides context for AI agent decision-making about product applicability.

data.current_description: Retrieve target animal species for veterinary drug products.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve target animal species for veterinary drug product
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the target animal species for which a veterinary drug product is authorized. Accepts drug product identifiers as input parameters. Returns species information including species code and common name. Use this operation to determine which animal species (e.g., cattle, poultry, companion animals) a veterinary drug product is approved for use with.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about whether this applies to all products or only veterinary products. Description lacks input parameter details and specific output structure. Enhanced version clarifies this is veterinary-specific, explains input requirements, specifies return values with examples, and provides context for AI agent decision-making about product applicability.
